tasks.label: Compile Java
tasks.command: mkdir -p bin && mkdir -p lib && cp "/Users/oussamaguelfaa/Downloads/ini4j-0.5.1.jar" lib/ && cp "/Users/oussamaguelfaa/Downloads/maqitSimulator (1).jar" "lib/maqitSimulator.jar" && "/Users/oussamaguelfaa/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/pleiades.java-extension-pack-jdk/java/17/bin/javac" -source 17 -target 17 -d bin -cp "lib/ini4j-0.5.1.jar:lib/maqitSimulator.jar:." src/Simulator/*.java
